style_genre.label: Style / Genre
style_genre.description: The overarching photographic discipline and intent.

high_end_ecommerce.label: High-End E-commerce
high_end_ecommerce.subtitle: Pristine, commercial focus
high_end_ecommerce.description: Hyper-realistic, pristine commercial photography designed to sell a product. Features flawless color accuracy, sharp edge-to-edge focus, zero distracting artifacts, and perfectly retouched matte skin. The garment or product is the absolute hero, with every seam and texture crisply defined.

lo_fi_2000s_digicam.label: Lo-Fi 2000s Digicam
lo_fi_2000s_digicam.subtitle: Raw, nostalgic, candid
lo_fi_2000s_digicam.description: Emulates an early 2000s point-and-shoot digital camera snapshot. Features digital noise, slight pixelation, flat high-key exposure, washed-out highlights, and an unposed, candid, lived-in documentary feel.

vintage_editorial.label: Vintage Editorial
vintage_editorial.subtitle: 35mm film, subtle grain
vintage_editorial.description: A classic fashion magazine aesthetic shot on 35mm film stock. Characterized by subtle film grain, slightly lifted (faded) blacks, soft highlight roll-off, natural micro-contrast, and a nostalgic but highly professional artistic framing.

cinematic_lifestyle.label: Cinematic / Lifestyle
cinematic_lifestyle.subtitle: Narrative-driven, rich
cinematic_lifestyle.description: Looks like a still frame pulled from a high-budget modern film. Features rich color grading, deep atmospheric storytelling, motivated lighting (light that feels like it comes from the environment), and a deliberate use of depth of field to separate the subject from the background.

minimalist_studio.label: Minimalist Studio
minimalist_studio.subtitle: Clean, stark, modern
minimalist_studio.description: A contemporary, ultra-clean aesthetic. Utilizes stark negative space, geometric framing, and a complete absence of clutter. The mood is calm, modern, and highly structural, focusing on shapes and silhouettes.

documentary.label: Documentary
documentary.subtitle: Unposed, lived-in realism
documentary.description: Raw and authentic street or photojournalism style. Subjects are not posing for the camera; they are captured in natural mid-motion or thought. Flaws in the environment are kept to enhance realism.

moodboard_grading.label: Moodboard / Grading
moodboard_grading.description: The color palette, lighting contrast, and emotional atmosphere.

flash_editorial.label: Flash Editorial
flash_editorial.subtitle: Harsh, high-key, desaturated
flash_editorial.description: Edgy, stark fashion photography. Uses harsh direct light that blows out the scene uniformly, creating hard, distinct drop-shadows on the wall behind the subject. The color palette features soft neutrals, desaturated skin tones, and a cool, gritty urban wash.

street_photography.label: Street Photography
street_photography.subtitle: Natural, moody, contrasty
street_photography.description: Gritty, high-contrast grading with deep, rich blacks. Colors are grounded in reality but slightly muted to emphasize urban textures like concrete, asphalt, and brick.

warm_ambient.label: Warm Ambient
warm_ambient.subtitle: Rich midtones, amber, tungsten
warm_ambient.description: An inviting, opulent, and calm atmosphere. Dominated by warm amber, tungsten, and golden lighting. The color palette heavily relies on rich midtones like espresso, walnut, camel, tobacco leather, cream, and muted burgundy. Shadows are soft and diffused.

mystique_city.label: Mystique City
mystique_city.subtitle: Cold fog, neon reflections, desaturated
mystique_city.description: A moody, atmospheric night aesthetic. Heavily features thick cold fog or mist that flattens the background, wet pavement reflecting muted neon signs, and a cold color palette of slate, charcoal, icy blue, and desaturated navy.

clean_luxury.label: Clean Luxury
clean_luxury.subtitle: Soft pastels, airy, high-clarity
clean_luxury.description: Expensive, resort-like luxury. High clarity, incredibly soft pastel tones, bright whites, and an airy, breathable atmosphere. Shadow contrast is minimized to create a light, floating, flawless mood.

dark_academia.label: Dark Academia
dark_academia.subtitle: Moody, warm, deep shadows
dark_academia.description: A moody, intellectual vibe. Features deep, crushing shadows (low-key lighting) and a palette of dark greens, navy, mahogany, and brass. The mood is introspective, quiet, and slightly gothic.

framing.label: Framing
framing.description: How much of the subject occupies the canvas.

extreme_closeup.label: Extreme Close-Up
extreme_closeup.subtitle: Macro details
extreme_closeup.description: Focuses entirely on a specific detail. A tightly cropped shot showing only the texture of the fabric, the stitching of a shoe, or the eyes of a character.

closeup.label: Close-Up
closeup.subtitle: Headshot / upper chest
closeup.description: Framed tightly from the shoulders or upper chest to the top of the head. Focuses heavily on the subject's face, expression, and neckline details.

medium_shot.label: Medium Shot
medium_shot.subtitle: Waist up
medium_shot.description: Framed from the waist up. Balances the subject's upper body styling and facial expression while revealing some of the background environment.

three_quarter.label: Three-Quarter
three_quarter.subtitle: Knees up, seated
three_quarter.description: Framed from just below the knees or mid-thigh up. Perfect for capturing seated subjects or showcasing trousers and jackets while still maintaining a portrait feel.

full_body.label: Full Body Shot
full_body.subtitle: Head to toe
full_body.description: The entire subject is visible from the top of their head to their footwear, with some breathing room around them. Captures the complete silhouette and outfit.

wide_establishing.label: Wide / Establishing
wide_establishing.subtitle: Subject in environment
wide_establishing.description: A pulled-back shot where the subject is relatively small within the frame. The primary focus is on showcasing the scale, architecture, and mood of the surrounding environment.

camera_angle.label: Camera Angle
camera_angle.description: The camera's physical relationship to the subject.

eye_level.label: Eye-Level
eye_level.subtitle: Neutral, standard
eye_level.description: The camera points straight ahead at the subject's eye level. Creates a natural, grounded, and objective viewpoint.

low_angle.label: Low Angle
low_angle.subtitle: Heroic, imposing
low_angle.description: The camera is positioned below the subject, pointing upward. Makes the subject look powerful, tall, imposing, and fashionable. Elevates the visual status of the character.

high_angle.label: High Angle
high_angle.subtitle: Vulnerable, overview
high_angle.description: The camera is positioned above the subject, pointing downward. Can make the subject look smaller or provide a clear view of the ground/floor styling around them.

overhead_flatlay.label: Overhead / Flat-lay
overhead_flatlay.subtitle: Product focus
overhead_flatlay.description: The camera is positioned directly above, pointing straight down at a 90-degree angle. Ideal for arranged products, accessories, or subjects lying perfectly flat on the ground.

dutch_angle.label: Dutch Angle
dutch_angle.subtitle: Canted, dynamic
dutch_angle.description: The camera is tilted on its roll axis, causing the horizon line to be slanted. Creates a feeling of unease, dynamic motion, or edgy avant-garde fashion.

over_shoulder.label: Over-the-Shoulder
over_shoulder.subtitle: Intimate, observational
over_shoulder.description: Shot from behind a foreground element (like another person's shoulder). Creates a voyeuristic, documentary, or highly intimate framing.

lens_focal_length.label: Lens / Focal Length
lens_focal_length.description: The optical physics that distort or flatten the image.

wide.label: Wide
wide.subtitle: 14-24mm (Dramatic, distorted edges)
wide.description: Captures a massive field of view. Edges of the frame will stretch and distort slightly. Creates a dynamic, immersive, and sometimes exaggerated perspective.

standard.label: Standard
standard.subtitle: 35-50mm (Natural, documentary)
standard.description: Closely mimics the field of view of the human eye. Produces zero distortion. The standard choice for documentary, street, and realistic lifestyle photography.

portrait.label: Portrait
portrait.subtitle: 85mm (Flattering, subject separation)
portrait.description: Compresses the subject's features flatteringly. Naturally creates a shallow depth of field (blurry background/bokeh), isolating the subject from their surroundings beautifully.

telephoto.label: Telephoto
telephoto.subtitle: 135mm+ (High compression, flat background)
telephoto.description: Extreme zoom that flattens the distance between the subject and the background. Background elements appear massive and right behind the subject. Excellent for isolating subjects in busy environments.

macro.label: Macro
macro.subtitle: 100mm (Extreme product detail)
macro.description: Specialized optics for focusing incredibly close to the subject. Exaggerates the micro-textures of materials, leathers, metals, and fabrics with an extremely shallow depth of field.

auto.label: Auto
auto.subtitle: Dynamic selection
auto.description: Allow the LLM to dynamically select the best focal length based on the chosen Framing parameter.

lighting_setup.label: Lighting Setup
lighting_setup.description: The source, direction, and quality of illumination.

direct_onamera_flash.label: Direct On-Camera Flash
direct_onamera_flash.subtitle: Paparazzi, flat exposure
direct_onamera_flash.description: A harsh, bright burst of light coming from the exact center of the camera. Eliminates facial shadows but creates hard, dark silhouettes immediately behind the subject. Highly reflective on wet surfaces and hardware.

softbox_diffused.label: Softbox / Diffused Studio
softbox_diffused.subtitle: Even, commercial soft falloff
softbox_diffused.description: Flattering, even, and soft illumination. Shadows have smooth, gradual gradients (soft falloff). The gold standard for commercial and e-commerce product clarity.

hard_sunlight.label: Hard Sunlight
hard_sunlight.subtitle: Harsh shadows, high contrast
hard_sunlight.description: Direct, un-diffused sunlight. Creates sharp, crisp, high-contrast shadows. Highly dramatic, revealing every textural bump and fold in clothing.

golden_hour.label: Golden Hour
golden_hour.subtitle: Warm, directional, long shadows
golden_hour.description: The light of sunset or sunrise. Characterized by a highly directional, horizontal angle that casts long, dramatic shadows. The light is naturally warm, golden, and cinematic.

blue_hour_overcast.label: Blue Hour / Overcast
blue_hour_overcast.subtitle: Soft, cool, diffused
blue_hour_overcast.description: Shot before sunrise, after sunset, or under heavy clouds. The light is extremely soft, completely shadowless, and carries a moody, cool, bluish-gray tint.

cinematic_neon_practical.label: Cinematic Neon / Practical
cinematic_neon_practical.subtitle: Motivated street light
cinematic_neon_practical.description: Lit solely by glowing elements within the scene—like neon store signs, street lamps, or car headlights. Features stark color contrasts (e.g., cyan and magenta) and deep pockets of pure black darkness.

soft_window_light.label: Soft Window Light
soft_window_light.subtitle: Directional, diffuse indoor shadows
soft_window_light.description: Indoor lighting that relies on natural light pouring through a large window. It falls off quickly, creating beautiful, soft, directional gradients across the subject's face or body, leaving the background in darker ambient shadow.

environment_setting.label: Environment / Setting
environment_setting.description: The physical stage of the photoshoot.

pure_solid_white.label: Pure Solid White Studio
pure_solid_white.subtitle: Strict #FFFFFF, no off-white
pure_solid_white.description: A complete absence of background. Strictly a pure, clipped-white canvas (#FFFFFF) with absolutely no gradients, off-white shadows, or horizon lines. Ideal for strict e-commerce cutouts.

seamless_neutral.label: Seamless Neutral Studio
seamless_neutral.subtitle: Slate grey, beige paper
seamless_neutral.description: A professional indoor studio featuring a seamless paper backdrop sweeping onto the floor. Typically styled in neutral tones like slate gray, beige, or soft charcoal. Provides a clean, distraction-free environment with visible floor shadows.

urban_gritty_street.label: Urban: Gritty Street
urban_gritty_street.subtitle: Alleys, faded storefronts
urban_gritty_street.description: A raw city environment. Features cracked concrete, weathered brick, faded signage, metal fences, and subtle urban decay.

urban_classic_facades.label: Urban: Classic Facades
urban_classic_facades.subtitle: European stone, stately architecture
urban_classic_facades.description: High-end city locations. Features large stone pillars, Parisian or European-style architectural details, wrought-iron balconies, and clean, sweeping sidewalks.

interior_curated_retro.label: Interior: Curated Retro
interior_curated_retro.subtitle: Warm wood paneling, velvet
interior_curated_retro.description: A highly styled, vintage-inspired indoor room. Features mid-century furniture, walnut wood paneling, velvet textiles, and carefully placed props (books, ceramics) with thoughtful negative space.

interior_modern_minimalist.label: Interior: Modern Minimalist
interior_modern_minimalist.subtitle: Bare plaster, glass
interior_modern_minimalist.description: An ultra-modern indoor space. Dominated by sleek lines, bare plaster or concrete walls, large glass windows, and a lack of traditional decor.

atmospheric_abstract.label: Atmospheric / Abstract
atmospheric_abstract.subtitle: Dense fog, color voids
atmospheric_abstract.description: A setting defined by weather or absence rather than physical objects. The background fades into a dense fog, a milky mist, or an infinite void of dark color, removing all geographical context.

square_1_1.label: 1:1 Square
square_1_1.description: An equal width-to-height ratio. The standard format for Instagram grid posts and general digital catalogs.

portrait_4_5.label: 4:5 Portrait
portrait_4_5.description: Slightly taller than it is wide. The optimal format for maximizing screen real estate on mobile social media feeds.

vertical_9_16.label: 9:16 Vertical
vertical_9_16.description: A tall vertical crop. Specifically utilized for Instagram Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts, and full-screen Meta advertising.

landscape_16_9.label: 16:9 Landscape
landscape_16_9.description: A wide, cinematic crop. Best suited for website hero banners, desktop viewing, and video thumbnails.

standard_3_2.label: 3:2 Standard
standard_3_2.description: The classic 35mm film and standard DSLR photography aspect ratio. Offers a traditional, timeless photographic canvas.
